Archive — Drop 01/July 2026 Real stock • 3 lots • Randburg, Gauteng

Every photo below is my own. Dust, fingerprints and all. Price shown only on the non-alcohol lot — the bottles are enquiry only, 18+.

LOT 01 • 1998 • 3.0L MAGNUM
Metal case • green satin • brass shield
No.
192
192 OF 203 SPECIAL EDITION

Pick'n Pay Into The Millennium 1998 Cabernet Sauvignon 3.0L Magnum

Simonsvlei International • Wine of Origin Coastal Region • A135 • ALC 12.5% VOL • 3.0L

Only 203 of these were made for the millennium — this is number 192. The shield label is solid brass, stamped. The metal presentation box has honest patina and green satin inside. Wax cap chipped but sealed. Kept upright in the garage, not a cellar. Sealed and collectible — not guaranteed drinkable.

No online price • Enquiry only • 18+ • Sold as memorabilia, not guaranteed drinkable • Randburg collection or licensed courier, ID required

LOT 02 • KWV • 10 YEAR
REPUBLIC ERA • 750ML

KWV 10 Year Old Brandy 750ml — Republic Era

Ko-Operatieve Wijnbouwers Vereniging Van Zuid-Afrika Beperkt • Paarl

Vintage Republic-era bottling. The back label says it plainly: pure copper potstill distillation, backed by 300 years of viticulture tradition, aged at least ten years in oak casks. Green bottle, gold label. Back label photographed below — read it yourself.

No online price • Enquiry only • 18+ • Sold as memorabilia, not guaranteed drinkable • Randburg collection or licensed courier, ID required

LOT 03 • BRASS • ROTARY
YELLOW BAKELITE HANDSET

Brass Pedestal Rotary Telephone — Yellow Bakelite

Floor standing • ~1.1m tall • Heavy • Rotary dial

A brass column you answer the phone on. Ornate etched bands down the pedestal, yellow bakelite handset, coiled cord present, side-mounted rotary dial. Electrics untested — sold as decor. It is heavy; bring a friend or let us courier it.
